calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Dorothy Chao To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BORIS DUKLER Motion To Compel Plaintiff Dorothy Chao To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Discovery is denied without prejudice, based on what appears to be a typographical error in the proof of service. The proof of service states that the motion papers were served on the plaintiff in pro per at "979 Vista Garande" in Millbrae, rather than at "979 Vista Grande". Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
